source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
o'-ji-a Augia: The wife of Jaddus, whose sons were removed from priesthood because their names were not found in the register, their ancestors having "usurped the office of the priesthood" (1 Esdras 5:38). Omitted in Ezr 2 and Ne 7.

�
